text: There is a sense of transition between spaces, from the bright emptiness and utility of a corridor to the vibrant engagement of an R+D exhibition wall. In the hallway, the atmosphere feels detached, almost sterile—a reminder of order, function, and perhaps a quiet anticipation. Yet stepping into the exhibition, the colors and ideas radiate curiosity and creativity. I feel a subtle shift: from inward to outward, from isolated contemplation to an invitation to interact. This contrast awakens me to the multiplicity of spaces, how each setting shapes the horizons of thought and mood.
